facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 1,628 reviews. At a fusion restaurant in Phu Quoc.

FUSION Treats on Đường Dinh Bà is earning that rating one plate at a time. Not the loud, tourist-strip kind of place. The kind locals keep going back to.

If your Phu Quoc food list is full of the same three spots, add this one.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
